data.title: JPMorgan upgrades Bitcoin miner, expects a 70% rally
data.description:
For the fourth quarter of 2024, JPMorgan (JPM) changed its Bitcoin miner price goals and estimates to take into account changes in the Bitcoin price and the network hashrate. The bank lowered its price target but the new prediction still shows that the price will go up 70%. Iren is JPM’s top pick in the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/jpmorgan-upgrades-bitcoin-miner-a-70-rally/

data.title: CZ: Bloomberg’s report is false, Binance did not purchase WLFI tokens and has no business dealings with WLFI
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Binance co-founder CZ posted on the X platform that Bloomberg published an unfounded and offensive article, and basically the entire article was purely fictitious. He/Binance had no business dealings with WLFI or the people mentioned in the article, nor did he purchase WLFI tokens.

data.title: Compound adopts Morpho’s tech for new Polygon vaults in controversial Gauntlet-led move
data.description:
The deal, proposed by Gauntlet, has drawn some criticism for essentially sidelining Compound and potential conflicts of interest.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/346161/compound-launches-new-vaults-rival-morpho-controversial-gauntlet-proposal?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: XRP Jumps 6% Following Ripple’s Licensing Approval in Dubai
data.description:
TL;DR Ripple has obtained a license to operate in the Dubai International Financial Centre (DIFC), making it the first blockchain-based payment company to receive authorization from the Dubai Financial Services Authority (DFSA).  The cross-border payments market in the United Arab Emirates (UAE) is estimated to exceed $40 billion, with growing demand for fast and efficient ... 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/xrp-jumps-6-following-ripples-licensing-approval-in-dubai/

data.title: On-chain transaction execution platform Definitive: EDGE token airdrop qualification query is now open
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On-chain transaction execution platform Definitive announced on the X platform that the EDGE token airdrop qualification query is now open. Existing Definitive users are eligible for the airdrop. Top active traders of Jupiter, Hyperliquid, Odos, 0x, Photon, Banana Gun, Drift, CowSwap and BullX may be eligible for the airdrop.

data.title: Coinbase: ATH and SYRUP trading is now live
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Coinbase announced that ATH and SYRUP transactions are now online. Users can log in to the Coinbase website, iOS and Android apps to buy, sell, exchange, send, receive or store related assets.

data.title: Banning Tether is a threat to national monetary security
data.description:
The following is an opinion piece by Tom Howard, Head of Financial Products and Regulatory Affairs at CoinList. Stablecoin Act drafts that would effectively ban Tether and other non-US stablecoin issuers from the US market due to offshore operations are circulating. This approach is a significant policy error. A robust global reserve currency thrives by […]
The post Banning Tether is a threat...
source: https://cryptoslate.com/banning-tether-is-a-threat-to-national-monetary-security/

data.title: Putin Agrees to 30-Day Ceasefire Amid Strategic Advantage in Kursk
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Russian President Vladimir Putin has announced Russia's agreement to a 30-day ceasefire. Despite this, Russia maintains a strategic advantage in the Kursk region. Putin emphasized the need to address whether Ukrainian forces will retreat unharmed or surrender their weapons. 

Putin also highlighted the necessity for further discussions on how the ceasefire will be monitored and how various detailed issues will be resolved. He mentioned the possibility of engaging in dialogue with U.S. President Donald Trump regarding these matters.

data.title: Meteora discloses incentive details: LP rewards increased from 10% to 15%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the incentive details disclosed by Meteora in the live broadcast, the M3M3 ecosystem (including token holders and pledgers) will receive 2% of the token supply allocated by the team, which has been snapshotted; LP rewards have increased from 10% to 15%. Meteora expressed its gratitude to the community for hearing the community's call and the community users who provided honest feedback, which are crucial to the future of Meteora.
